landing.badge: Automated — runs every day, no manual work
landing.heroSubtitle: Competitor Tracker automatically monitors your competitors' websites and alerts you the moment something changes — prices, offers, content, anything.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay ahead
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for local businesses who want to know what their competition is doing — without spending hours doing research manually.
landing.feature1Desc: We scrape your competitors' websites daily and flag any changes — new offers, price updates, removed services.
landing.feature2Desc: Every detected change is logged with severity — high, medium, or low — so you know what actually matters.
landing.feature3Desc: A full timeline of every change across all your competitors, organized by date so nothing slips through.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to stay one step ahead?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join businesses already tracking their competitors automatically.
